nasb.text: A sword against the Chaldeans,” declares the Lord, “And against the inhabitants of Babylon And against her officials and her wise men!

esv.text: “A sword against the Chaldeans, declares the Lord, and against the inhabitants of Babylon, and against her officials and her wise men!

cnv.text: 刀劍必攻擊迦勒底人， 攻擊巴比倫的居民， 攻擊它的領袖和智慧人。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “敌人要攻击巴比伦的居民及其首领和谋士；
